positive: A detailed, symmetrical, circular mandala composition featuring interconnected woodland elements: stylized silver birch leaves, whimsical gold deer silhouettes, delicate crystalline butterflies, and stylized flowing rivers. The design must have a strong, clean silhouette against a solid, contrasting background (e.g., deep navy or forest green). Style: Neo-tribal, highly detailed linework, etching art, and mandalic geometry. Composition: Central focus, suitable for seamless tiling or large apparel print. Lighting: High contrast, bright, even illumination. Color Direction: Limited palette of metallic gold, silver, deep charcoal, and accent teal. Clean vectors, print-ready, ornamental.
negative: blurry, distorted, artifacts, low quality, text, signature, watermark, dirty, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, cropped, out of focus, messy lines
